folio.label: 28v
folio.l: An C , lordes , had he in his route
Armed ful wele , w wertes sterne & stoute
¢ With Arcita , in stories as men fynde
The grete Emytrius , the kyng of Inde
Vp on a steede Bay , trapped in stel
Couäed with a cloth of gold , dyapred wel
Cam ridyng lyke the god , of armes Mars
His Cotearmåe , was of cloth of Tars
Couched with perles , white rounde & grete
His sadel was of brent gold , newe I bete
A mantelet , vp on his shulder hangyng
Bret ful of Rubies , rede as fir sparkelyng
His crispe heer , lyke rynges was I ronne
And that was ©elwe , and glet äed as the so~ne
His nose was hey , his eyen brigút Citryn~
His lippes rounde , his colour was sangwyn~
A fewe fraknes , in his face I spreynt
Be twixen ©elwe , and somdel blak I meynt
And as a lyou~ , he his lokyng caste
Of xxv é ©ere , his age I caste
His berd was wel bygo~ne , for to spénge
His throte was as a trompe , thonderynge
Vp on his hede , he wered a loirrer grene
Fressú and lusty , for to sene
Vp on his hand he bar , for his deduyt
An Egle tame , as ony lilly whyt
An C , lordes , had he with hi~ there
Alle armed saue here hedes , in al here gere
Ful richely , in alle manäe thynges
For trosteth wele , that Dukes Erles kynges
Were gadred , in this noble companye
For loue & for encres , of chyualrye
A boute this kyng , æäe ran on euäy part
Ful many a tame lyou~ , and leopart´
¢ And in this wyse , æeise lordes alle and some
Ben on the Sonday , to the Cite come
A boute prime , and in the Toun a ligút
This Theseus æis Duke , this worthy knygút
Whan he had brou©t he~ , in to his Citee
And Inned euäych of he~ , at his degree
He festeth hem , and doth so gret labour
To esen hem , and don hem aÂ honour
That ©et men wenen , æ no ma~nys wytte
Of none a state , ne coude amenden ytte
¢ The mynstralsie , the seruyce at the feest´

note.notetxt: seruycefeest´1339 notice the s and the f initial,the stem has double ascender.ODR
